jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Meesho - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!
